text: The module displays several targets designed for practicing needle passing, allowing the user to aim the needle accurately using robotic controls.
The demonstration module shows a main artery with several side branches. The task involves coagulating the side branches at two points and then cutting them in the middle.

The demonstration shows the burning of a vessel using a coagulation tool, followed by an attempt to cut the vessel not precisely in the middle, resulting in visible bleeding. The coagulation tool is then used again to control the bleeding.
